message:
Allow mem-backend fallback in VDBE storage cursor tests

Two test functions (basic cursor iteration and fallback-without-
transaction) now call set_reject_mem_fallback(false) to explicitly
permit the in-memory backend fallback, matching the test intent of
exercising cursor behavior rather than storage-mode enforcement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
